entity.summary: Bahrain-founded crypto brokerage and custody platform established in 2017, licensed by the Central Bank of Bahrain in July 2019, and later authorized by Abu Dhabi Global Market in 2023.
entity.notes: Rain's official history places inception and CBB sandbox entry in 2017. The CBB annual report records the Category 3 crypto-asset-services license on July 28, 2019.

expected.summary: Bahrain-based centralized exchange launched in 2017 and still operating under the Rain brand.

changes.summary: Bahrain-founded crypto brokerage and custody platform established in 2017, licensed by the Central Bank of Bahrain in July 2019, and later authorized by Abu Dhabi Global Market in 2023.
changes.notes: Rain's official history places inception and CBB sandbox entry in 2017. The CBB annual report records the Category 3 crypto-asset-services license on July 28, 2019.

events.title: Rain began its regulated-platform project in Bahrain
events.description: Rain was founded in 2017 and entered the Central Bank of Bahrain regulatory sandbox while building a regulated crypto-asset platform.
events.notes: The reviewed sources establish the year but not an exact public launch day, so January 1 is used as a year-level marker.

events.title: Rain received the first CBB Category 3 crypto-asset-services license
events.description: The Central Bank of Bahrain granted Rain Management W.L.L. the first license under its Crypto-Asset Module to provide Category 3 crypto-asset services.
events.notes: The exact date is recorded in the Central Bank of Bahrain's 2019 annual report.

evidence.title: About Rain
evidence.notes: Rain's official timeline places its inception and CBB regulatory-sandbox entry in 2017.

evidence.title: Rain granted Financial Services Permission by Abu Dhabi Global Market's Financial Services Regulatory Authority
evidence.notes: The official regulatory announcement identifies Rain as founded in 2017.

evidence.title: Central Bank of Bahrain Annual Report 2019
evidence.notes: The annual report records that Rain Management W.L.L. received the first CBB Category 3 Crypto-Asset Module license on July 28, 2019.

evidence.title: Regulatory license
evidence.notes: Rain describes its 2019 CBB Crypto-Asset Module license and 2023 ADGM Financial Services Permission.

evidence.title: Rain official platform
evidence.notes: The official domain verifies the current Rain identity and active crypto platform.
